subcodes.title: Letter to Haji Mirza Hasan 'Ali, Khal-i-Asghar, in Masqat
subcodes.first_line: May it be submitted unto your honored presence that, shouldst thou graciously inquire after this lowly one's condition, praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعرض عالی میرساند که هرگاه از طریق مرحمت جویای حال حقیر باشید لله الحمد و المنة
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @law of pilgrimage, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @Shaykhis
